2605.14984.title: Sat3DGen: Comprehensive Street-Level 3D Scene Generation from Single Satellite Image
2605.14984.paper_summary: Generating a street-level 3D scene from a single satellite image is a crucial yet challenging task. Current methods present a stark trade-off: geometry-colorization models achieve high geometric fidelity but are typically building-focused and lack semantic diversity. In contrast, proxy-based models use feed-forward image-to-3D frameworks to generate holistic scenes by jointly learning geometry and texture, a process that yields rich content but coarse and unstable geometry. We attribute these geometric failures to the extreme viewpoint gap and sparse, inconsistent supervision inherent in satellite-to-street data. We introduce Sat3DGen to address these fundamental challenges, which embodies a geometry-first methodology. This methodology enhances the feed-forward paradigm by integrating novel geometric constraints with a perspective-view training strategy, explicitly countering the primary sources of geometric error. This geometry-centric strategy yields a dramatic leap in both 3D accuracy and photorealism. For validation, we first constructed a new benchmark by pairing the VIGOR-OOD test set with high-resolution DSM data. On this benchmark, our method improves geometric RMSE from 6.76m to 5.20m. Crucially, this geometric leap also boosts photorealism, reducing the Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) from $\sim$40 to 19 against the leading method, Sat2Density++, despite using no extra tailored image-quality modules. We demonstrate the versatility of our high-quality 3D assets through diverse downstream applications, including semantic-map-to-3D synthesis, multi-camera video generation, large-scale meshing, and unsupervised single-image Digital Surface Model (DSM) estimation. The code has been released on https://github.com/qianmingduowan/Sat3DGen.
2605.14984.paper_summary_zh: 從單一衛星影像生成街道級別的3D場景是一項關鍵但具挑戰性的任務。<lb/>當前的方法呈現出明顯的權衡：幾何著色模型實現了高幾何真實性，但通常專注於建築，缺乏語義多樣性。<lb/>相對而言，基於代理的模型使用前饋影像到3D框架通過共同學習幾何和紋理來生成整體場景，這一過程產生了豐富的內容，但幾何較粗糙且不穩定。<lb/>我們將這些幾何失敗歸因於衛星到街道數據中固有的極端視點差距和稀疏、不一致的監督。<lb/>我們引入Sat3DGen來解決這些基本挑戰，該方法體現了幾何優先的方法論。<lb/>這種方法論通過將新穎的幾何約束與透視視圖訓練策略相結合來增強前饋範式，明確對抗幾何錯誤的主要來源。<lb/>這種以幾何為中心的策略在3D準確性和照片真實性方面都帶來了顯著的飛躍。<lb/>為了驗證，我們首先通過將VIGOR-OOD測試集與高解析度DSM數據配對來構建一個新的基準。<lb/>在這個基準上，我們的方法將幾何RMSE從6.76米改善到5.20米。<lb/>至關重要的是，這一幾何飛躍也提升了照片真實性，將Fréchet Inception Distance (FID)從約40降低到19，相較於領先的方法Sat2Density++，儘管未使用任何額外的定制影像質量模組。<lb/>我們通過多樣的下游應用展示了我們高品質3D資產的多功能性，包括語義地圖到3D合成、多攝像頭視頻生成、大規模網格化和無監督單影像數字表面模型(DSM)估計。<lb/>代碼已在 https://github.com/qianmingduowan/Sat3DGen 上發布。
2605.14984.author: Ming Qian et.al.
2605.14984.authors: Ming Qian, Zimin Xia, Changkun Liu, Shuailei Ma, Wen Wang, Zeran Ke, Bin Tan, Hang Zhang, Gui-Song Xia
